text_block_list.name: Umamusume in a Dress
text_block_list.text:
Yayyy! I got one! I really got one!<n>Thanks for
coming with me, Bourbon!<n>The store was so
crowded because<n>of the sale. You must be
exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My physical stamina and energy<n>levels are fine,
and I've detected no<n>issues as a result of the
sale. We<n>have accomplished our objective.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume in a Dress
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Um... But still, I'm sorry. That<n>wasn't
much fun, was it? I mean, I<n>haven't seen you
smile at all today...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That is—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume in a Dress
text_block_list.text:
No, it's okay! You don't have to say<n>anything.
Thanks for coming with me!<n>I'll see ya next time!
Sorry again!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
choice_data_list: Did she get the wrong idea?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. It appears she<n>determined that I was
"bored" due to<n>my expression. However, that
conclusion is inaccurate.
choice_data_list: So you had a good time?
So you had a good time?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I completed a difficulty C objective,<n>securing an
item on sale, which also<n>let me see my friend
smile. Therefore,<n>the answer to your question is
"yes."
choice_data_list:
I'm sure the misunderstanding will work itself
out soon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I wonder. Past experience suggests<n>an eighty
percent probability that the<n>same situation will
occur again.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The next time is likely to be... at the<n>costume
party.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That video was just so adorable! We<n>should
throw a costume party, just<n>like the one in the
video!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I see. I'm pleased you appear to be<n>enjoying
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, just thinking up costume<n>ideas is
super fun!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And, um... the party prep and the party<n>itself are
gonna be super fun too, so...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: W-would you like to come?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I agreed at the time, but I have<n>determined that
there is a high<n>probability of my presence
dampening the mood.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Perhaps I had better decline after all.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon bows slightly and<n>walks off
towards the school building.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, what's with that gloomy<n>face? Is
something on your mind?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'd be more than happy to lend<n>you an ear.
♪ If something's troubling<n>you, a problem shared
is a problem<n>halved.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ah... So that's how Bourbon is<n>feeling? I'm
planning to attend the<n>costume party myself, but...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Right. You can leave this all to me. I'll<n>speak with
Bourbon. After all, the<n>more people that come to
the party,<n>the more fun it'll be!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, Bourrrbon.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well done with your training. By the<n>way, I heard
you're worried about<n>the costume party.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...You're also attending, correct?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I am. The party's called "The More<n>the Scarier."
♪ So won't you join us,<n>Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: But, I...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Rice invited you to the party because<n>you're a
very special friend to her.<n>And to me too, of
course.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You're not the slightest bit boring. In<n>fact, if you
don't come, I'll miss you<n>so much I might even
cry...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Understood. I will optimize my<n>conduct for the
event: ensure that my<n>expression remains
jovial, and—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, no. You'll be perfectly fine<n>just as
you are. Forcing yourself to<n>smile is very much a
no-no.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: But if I don't...
choice_data_list: I think you're fine just as you are!

How about a costume that'll match your usual
expression?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I'm fine as I am? Without any...<n>special changes?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In order for everyone to enjoy the<n>party, it's
probably best for Mihono<n>Bourbon to just be
herself. That way<n>she can relax and have a good
time.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That's right. There's no need to<n>overthink it. We
all want to party with<n>the usual Bourbon we all
know and<n>love. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: The usual me...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Acknowledged. I'll research an<n>appropriate
costume and make it as<n>soon as possible.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Before anyone can offer to help,<n>Mihono
Bourbon dashes off at<n>astonishing speed.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, that's a nice idea too. A costume<n>doesn't
need to transform yourself<n>entirely, after all. It's
just as much<n>fun to think of a costume that's
just<n>right for you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: You mean... a cyborg costume?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That would be wonderful as<n>well. I'm sure
you'd make a very<n>strong and cool cyborg. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Understood. Commencing search for<n>a suitable
costume. I will accomplish<n>this mission no matter
what.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Although the goal is simply to have a<n>good time,
Mihono Bourbon faces her<n>mission with
steadfast determination.
